title: paragymnopteris bipinnata var. auriculata
intro: Paragymnopteris bipinnata var. auriculata, also known as the auriculate paragymnopteris fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Paragymnopteris bipinnata var. auriculata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in topical applications such as creams and salves to harness its therapeutic properties.
